text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 59 

OUD_HOSP_MEDICARE_EVER 

LABEL: Opioid-Related Hospitalization or ED First Ever Occurrence Date — Medicare Only Claims 

DESCRIPTION: This variable shows the date when the beneficiary first met the criteria for the Opioid-Related 
Hospitalization or emergency department (ED) visit indicator. The variable will be blank for 
beneficiaries
